    • updateAccount

      public AccountsUpdateAccountRequestBuilder updateAccount()
      Update Account

      UPDATE Updates an Account.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • updateAccount

      public AccountsUpdateAccountResponse updateAccount(String accountId, AccountRequestUpdate accountRequestUpdate) throws Exception
      Update Account

      UPDATE Updates an Account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      accountRequestUpdate - A single record representing an owner or manager of an Account.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateAccount

      public AccountsUpdateAccountResponse updateAccount(String accountId, Optional<String> updateMask, AccountRequestUpdate accountRequestUpdate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Update Account

      UPDATE Updates an Account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      updateMask - The list of fields to update. Updatable Fields `advised` `cat_account_holder_type` `primary_registered_rep_id` `investment_profile.account_goals.investment_objective` `investment_profile.account_goals.risk_tolerance` `investment_profile.account_goals.liquidity_needs` `investment_profile.account_goals.time_horizon` `investment_profile.customer_profile.annual_income_range_usd` `investment_profile.customer_profile.liquid_net_worth_range_usd` `investment_profile.customer_profile.total_net_worth_range_usd` `investment_profile.customer_profile.federal_tax_bracket` `wrap_fee_billed` `managed`
      accountRequestUpdate - A single record representing an owner or manager of an Account.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      public AccountsUpdatePartyResponse updateParty(String accountId, String partyId, PartyRequestUpdate partyRequestUpdate) throws Exception
      Update Party

      Updates a Party.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      partyId - The party id.
      partyRequestUpdate - A single record representing an owner or manager of an Account. Contains fully populated Party Identity object.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateParty

      public AccountsUpdatePartyResponse updateParty(String accountId, String partyId, Optional<String> updateMask, PartyRequestUpdate partyRequestUpdate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Update Party

      Updates a Party.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      partyId - The party id.
      updateMask - The list of fields to update. Updatable Fields `phone_number` `email_address` `statement_delivery_preference` `trade_confirmation_delivery_preference` `tax_document_delivery_preference` `proxy_delivery_preference` `prospectus_delivery_preference` `mailing_address.region_code` `mailing_address.postal_code` `mailing_address.administrative_area` `mailing_address.locality` `mailing_address.address_lines`
      partyRequestUpdate - A single record representing an owner or manager of an Account. Contains fully populated Party Identity object.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • closeAccount

      public AccountsCloseAccountRequestBuilder closeAccount()
      Close Account

      CUSTOM Places an ACCT_MAINT_CLOSURE_PREP_BY_CORRESPONDENT restriction on the Account ready for closure.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • createTrustedContact

      public AccountsCreateTrustedContactRequestBuilder createTrustedContact()
      Create Trusted Contact

      Creates a new Trusted Contact for an account.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • createTrustedContact

      public AccountsCreateTrustedContactResponse createTrustedContact(String accountId, TrustedContactCreate trustedContactCreate) throws Exception
      Create Trusted Contact

      Creates a new Trusted Contact for an account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      trustedContactCreate - A Trusted Contact is a person designated to verify the well being of the account holder. Only one form of contact information is required; An account may contain zero, one, or many.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • createTrustedContact

      public AccountsCreateTrustedContactResponse createTrustedContact(String accountId, TrustedContactCreate trustedContactCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Create Trusted Contact

      Creates a new Trusted Contact for an account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      trustedContactCreate - A Trusted Contact is a person designated to verify the well being of the account holder. Only one form of contact information is required; An account may contain zero, one, or many.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      Parameters:

      trustedContactId - The trustedContact id.
      trustedContactUpdate - A Trusted Contact is a person designated to verify the well being of the account holder. Only one form of contact information is required; An account may contain zero, one, or many.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateTrustedContact

      public AccountsUpdateTrustedContactResponse updateTrustedContact(String accountId, String trustedContactId, Optional<String> updateMask, TrustedContactUpdate trustedContactUpdate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Update Trusted Contact

      Updates a Trusted Contact.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      trustedContactId - The trustedContact id.
      updateMask - The list of fields to update. Updatable Fields `given_name` `middle_names` `family_name` `phone_number` `email_address` `mailing_address.region_code` `mailing_address.postal_code` `mailing_address.administrative_area` `mailing_address.locality` `mailing_address.address_lines`
      trustedContactUpdate - A Trusted Contact is a person designated to verify the well being of the account holder. Only one form of contact information is required; An account may contain zero, one, or many.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
